'''Ijix Harona''' was an officer of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] and later [[Galactic Alliance Defense Force]].

==Biography==
In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] Harona was assigned to the [[Starship/Legends|starship]], ''[[Glorious]]'', where he served under [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]] in his search for the [[Teljkon Vagabond]].

Following a promotion around [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] Harona was serving as commanding officer of [[Scimitar Squadron (New Republic)|Scimitar Squadron]] in the war against the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Behind the scenes==
''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' describes Harona as both a [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] and a Major. His rank may have been a brevet promotion during the war or a simple publishing mistake, especially as he was flying under the command of Lt. Colonel Jaina Solo in ''The Final Prophecy''. However, in his entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', he is stated to be a Colonel by the time he commands Scimitar Squadron.
